'''Kreesis''' was the largest continent located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Algara II]]. The [[City/Legends|cities]] of [[Algarine]], [[Benis]], and [[Tivin]] were all located on the land mass. The popular [[Club Prosperine]], the planet's main tourist attraction, was also located there.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1992-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Two]]''
*<!-- 1994-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''
